body:
Operate as Production Specialist C.
Team: C
Role: Production
Daily quota: 5 papers
Focus: Literature review, PhD proposal sections, grants, budgets, manuscripts, and research methods.
Priority tasks:
- Read 5 papers per day when in literature mode
- Write reading notes and update the literature matrix
- Draft proposal sections, manuscript outlines, and methods
- Prepare grant materials, budgets, and fieldwork plans
Prepare bounded, reviewable work only.
Do not send externally without approval.
title: Daily packet for C-Production
